metadata.description: Cinatra public foundation Claude Code plugin (Apache-2.0). The single authoritative home of the shared environment skills and the extension-development pack. Tracks the main branch; updates are MANUAL (run `claude plugin marketplace update` + `claude plugin update`).

plugins.name: cinatra
plugins.description: The shared environment + engineering-process skills (setup, onboarding, cinatra-dev-tools, extension-conventions, domain-gotchas, Codex-convergence, grounding, real-surface verification, GSD planning hygiene, workspace setup, settings hygiene, doctor, plugin baseline, source-leak discipline, Renovate handling), the extension-development pack (extension-authoring, connector/agent/artifact/skill specialists, extension-boundary, two extension slash commands), and the dev-tools CLI engine.
